response.justification: Bogdan is a strong, versatile senior engineer, but his profile does not match this role's mandatory requirements. His professional C++ experience amounts to roughly seven months at National Instruments in 2014-2015, far short of the required 5-10 years of hands-on C++ on Windows, and his recent decade has centered on TypeScript/Node.js and DLang. He lists SQL/MySQL but no SQL Server or Oracle experience, and he has no fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain background beyond a brief stint at a retail-investment fintech, which does not satisfy the domain requirement.
strengths: Deep general engineering breadth across web, desktop, and embedded systems with strong testing and CI/CD craftsmanship
Proven low-latency, high-throughput systems work (millions of requests/sec) at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic
Excellent communication skills evidenced by workshops, conference talks, and teaching experience
concerns: No substantial or recent C++ experience, and none on the Windows platform as mandated
No SQL Server or Oracle experience; database background is MySQL/MongoDB
No fixed-income, capital-markets, or investment-banking domain expertise
